title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers provides a step-by-step checklist for cleaning up AWS resources to avoid surprise billing charges. The video covers hidden charges from RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms as a preventive measure.
